bio_heading: Join me on your yoga journey
bio_body:
I'm a registered yoga instructor (E-RYT500, Yoga Alliance, since 2006) and adjunct faculty member in the Exercise Science department at Mesa Community College. I've led group fitness yoga sessions since 2008, and my practice spans over two decades.

My teaching draws from physical alignment, mindful sequencing, and breath awareness — bringing together postures, breathing techniques, meditation, and visualization so each class nourishes body and mind.
teaching_body:
Classes are designed to be accessible to all levels and ages. Whether you're stepping onto a mat for the first time or deepening a long-standing practice, I meet you where you are. Every session incorporates:

  • ✦ Physical alignment and posture guidance
  • ✦ Mindful breathing and pranayama
  • ✦ Meditation and visualization
  • ✦ A warm, welcoming community

services.title: Weekly Classes
services.body: Group classes at Mesa Community College and Sunland Springs Village — beginner-friendly and open to all levels.

services.title: Private Sessions
services.body: One-on-one or small group sessions tailored to your individual needs, goals, and pace.

services.title: Online Yoga
services.body: Recorded and live online sessions through Mesa Community College and YouTube.

services.title: Workshops & Events
services.body: Occasional specialty workshops, girls' nights in, birthday parties, bridal showers, and more.

travel_heading: Living My Yoga as I Travel
travel_body: I believe yoga is a practice you carry with you everywhere. Over the years I've photographed yoga poses at incredible locations — Australia, Egypt, China, Ireland, Canada, and throughout the United States. Photography credits: April Yarger and Liz Ansley.
